rows.label: qev051401_MSG0001
rows.name: You appear to be a BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0002
rows.name:
My name is Zo Zinath.
I have an earnest request to ask of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0003
rows.name:
As you know, we carry a shameful history
of long submitting to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0004
rows.name: We are finally in a position to govern ourselves now, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I... still harbor an unresolved bitterness
deep in my gut.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0006
rows.name:
I have constantly been searching for an opportunity
to clear away this muddy torrent within my heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0007
rows.name:
And now, I have finally succeeded
in finding that opportunity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I obtained information that could deal
a severe blow to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_JNK0010
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev051401_SEL0011
rows.name: Listen to his information.

rows.label: qev051401_JNK0020
rows.name: Reprimand

rows.label: qev051401_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him that acting out of spite is wrong.

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Are you interested?
Does this mean you will accept my request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Truly, an Earthling. We share common ground
when it comes to a culture that values shame and honor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0011
rows.name: You are mistaken. This is not out of spite.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0012
rows.name:
It is nothing less than an expression of the pure spirit
of the Lars, who are ready to die for honor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0013
rows.name: Aliens may not be able to understand this logic, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0014
rows.name: I am certain an Earthling can understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0015
rows.name: I eagerly ask for your cooperation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0016
rows.name:
There is a Growth fortress called Badr Stronghold
in the northwestern part of the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0017
rows.name:
It appears they are currently developing
a new weapon there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0018
rows.name:
If we can steal the blueprints for this new weapon,
we should be able to deal a significant blow to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0019
rows.name:
I want to entrust you with the mission
of seizing these blueprints.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0020
rows.name:
We are the ones making the request, but if the Growth
succeeds in developing this new weapon,
it will surely pose a threat to NLA as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0021
rows.name: In other words, this information is vital for Earthlings too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0022
rows.name:
As comrades facing the same enemy in the Growth,
I want to believe this operation will greatly contribute
to both of our futures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0023
rows.name:
The Growth's influence is spreading far and wide
across the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0024
rows.name:
I received information that they are developing a new weapon
at Badr Stronghold, located in the northwest of the continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Development is already underway, but if we can just steal
the blueprints, we will have a way to counter it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051401_MSG0026
rows.name: Hurry and seize them.[ST:wait ]
